failure_rule: Errors fail the workflow. Warnings reduce the public score without blocking adoption.

readme.description: A public repository has a README.

npm-lock.description: Node dependencies are locked when package.json exists.

actions-pin.description: Third-party actions use immutable full commit SHAs.

prose-dash.description: Portfolio-facing prose follows the estate style.

banned-word.description: Portfolio-facing prose avoids banned marketing terms.

unfinished-copy.description: Public documentation contains no TODO or placeholder copy.

worker-meta.description: Cloudflare Workers visibly implement the /_meta convention.
